findings.title: North Star Metric: Accessibility Compliance Rate
findings.description: The Accessibility Compliance Rate measures the percentage of pages that meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards, reflecting the overall accessibility of the LearnPath platform for users with disabilities.
assumptions: The current number of audited pages is representative of the entire platform's accessibility status.
recommendations: Increase the number of pages audited to improve the accuracy of the compliance rate.

metadata.measurement_method: Percentage of pages passing WCAG 2.1 AA standards out of total audited pages.

findings.title: Primary KPI: Screen Reader Task Completion Rate
findings.description: Measures the percentage of tasks completed successfully by users relying on screen readers, indicating the effectiveness of accessibility features for visually impaired users.
assumptions: Users with disabilities are actively using the platform and attempting tasks.
recommendations: Implement improvements based on user feedback to enhance task completion rates.

metadata.measurement_method: Percentage of tasks completed by screen reader users.

findings.title: Primary KPI: Keyboard-Only Task Completion Rate
findings.description: Measures the percentage of tasks completed successfully by users relying on keyboard navigation, indicating the platform's accessibility for motor-impaired users.
assumptions: Users with motor disabilities are attempting tasks using keyboard navigation.
recommendations: Enhance keyboard navigation features to improve task completion rates.

metadata.measurement_method: Percentage of tasks completed by keyboard-only users.

findings.title: Guardrail Metric: Number of Critical WCAG Violations
findings.description: Tracks the number of critical WCAG violations present on the platform, ensuring that accessibility does not degrade over time.
assumptions: The count of violations is accurate and reflects the current state of the platform.
recommendations: Prioritize fixing critical violations to improve overall accessibility.

metadata.measurement_method: Count of critical WCAG violations identified during audits.

findings.title: Measurement Gap: Comprehensive User Feedback on Accessibility
findings.description: There is insufficient data on user experiences and feedback regarding accessibility features, which is critical for understanding user needs and improving the platform.
assumptions: User feedback is essential for identifying specific accessibility issues.
recommendations: Implement regular user feedback sessions focused on accessibility.

findings.title: Experiment Opportunity: Accessibility Feature A/B Testing
findings.description: Conduct A/B tests on different accessibility features (e.g., improved screen reader navigation vs. current navigation) to measure impact on task completion rates.
assumptions: Users will engage with the new features and provide measurable outcomes.
recommendations: Define statistical parameters for A/B testing, including sample size and significance level.

summary: The analysis identifies a North Star metric focused on accessibility compliance, along with primary KPIs for screen reader and keyboard-only task completion rates. Guardrail metrics monitor critical WCAG violations. Gaps in user feedback and opportunities for A/B testing are highlighted to enhance accessibility features.
